final_prompt.prompt:
Design a bold badge-style logo for an HVAC training brand.

风格/媒介: industrial badge logo, vector, flat, embroidery-optimized, uniform-ready, aggressive strong branding
构图:
  thick-bordered shield or badge outer shape
  crown integrated into the top border
  laurel branches embedded into the side borders (not floating)
  small stars aligned in the upper section
  central HVAC icon with bold thick lines, readable at distance
  bottom ribbon or line for secondary text
主体: logo for "Electro Rey LLC" — HVAC training brand
场景/背景: transparent / no background
光线/氛围:
色彩方案:
  deep navy #0A1F3D
  industrial gold #CFAF5A
  white #FFFFFF
  high contrast, no gradients
材质/纹理: flat vector, no thin lines, strong silhouette
文字(原样):
  ELECTRO REY — arc or strong horizontal lockup
  LLC — integrated cleanly under main name
  Salmo 91 — inside small bottom ribbon, minimal treatment
约束:
  optimized for embroidery, uniforms, trucks
  no thin lines, no gradients
  scalable, readable at small sizes
  keep "Salmo 91" minimal, no religious styling dominance
避免: clutter, over-decoration, floating decorative elements, thin strokes
